# enterpriseai.tools

> An open-source landscape tracker for enterprise AI tooling (48 tools across 4 categories). Each record links to an official source; the dataset is governed by `data/SCHEMA.md` and updated weekly.

Edited through a regulated-enterprise delivery lens: governance posture, deployment surface, ownership, sourcing quality, and operational fit are weighted above launch marketing. No analytics, no sign-up, no data capture.

## Per-tool pages
Every tracked tool has its own page at `/tools/<id>` carrying the full source-backed governance posture (data residency, deployment model, audit logging, SOC 2 / ISO 27001 / ISO 42001, EU AI Act role, license risk), with a primary source URL on every asserted claim.

## Hub pages
- [Home](https://www.enterpriseai.tools/): overview of the four tracked categories and the foundation platforms.
- [AI Platforms & Model Hubs](https://www.enterpriseai.tools/platforms/): Microsoft Foundry, Amazon Bedrock, Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform (formerly Google Vertex AI).
- [AI Agent Frameworks](https://www.enterpriseai.tools/agents/): cloud agent platforms + open-source frameworks.
- [AI Orchestration](https://www.enterpriseai.tools/orchestration/): workflow engines and automation.
- [AI Governance](https://www.enterpriseai.tools/governance/): guardrails, content safety, policy.
- [AI Assistants](https://www.enterpriseai.tools/assistants/): coding, productivity, build-your-own.
- [Weekly updates](https://www.enterpriseai.tools/updates/): high-impact market intelligence + release log.
- [EU AI Act tracker](https://www.enterpriseai.tools/eu-ai-act/): obligations by role, application timeline, and a subscribable deadline calendar (https://www.enterpriseai.tools/eu-ai-act-deadlines.ics).
- [Help me evaluate](https://www.enterpriseai.tools/evaluate/): guided client-side flow that ranks tools by governance fit.
- [About](https://www.enterpriseai.tools/about/): project scope, sourcing standards, and contribution rules.

## Data
- Full content for LLMs (single fetch): [llms-full.txt](https://www.enterpriseai.tools/llms-full.txt)
- Tools dataset (JSON): https://www.enterpriseai.tools/data/tools.json
- Platforms dataset (JSON): https://www.enterpriseai.tools/data/platforms.json
- Updates dataset (JSON): https://www.enterpriseai.tools/data/updates.json
- Every per-tool page: https://www.enterpriseai.tools/sitemap.xml
- Updates feed (Atom): https://www.enterpriseai.tools/updates.xml
- Source: https://github.com/tiberiuarva/enterpriseaitools

## Editorial standards
- Source-backed or not published. Every record carries a primary-source URL.
- License labels match upstream `LICENSE` files exactly; corrections go through a dedicated issue rather than silent edits.
- Canonical product names are tracked; prior names are preserved in `formerNames` / `aliases`.

## Curator
Tiberiu Arva — enterprise financial-services delivery lens.
